TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Elton_Brand, title = Elton_Brand, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Elton_Brand} }

S.FORM: Elton Brand sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1979, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 3, Elton Brand, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Elton Brand sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1979, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 3, Elton Brand, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
